---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Synapse AKG.

## 💡 Motivation
Please explain the motivation behind this feature. Is this related to a problem you're experiencing? Is this a feature you've seen in other systems that would be valuable here?

## 🎯 Use Case
Describe the specific use case this feature would enable. How would it benefit users or the system?

## 📋 Proposed Solution
If you have a specific implementation in mind, please describe it here:

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered:

## 📊 Impact Assessment
How would this feature impact:
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Memory usage
- [ ] API compatibility
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing

## 🎨 UI/UX Considerations
If this feature involves user interface changes, please describe:

## 🔧 Technical Details
Any technical considerations or implementation details:

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] I have provided clear use cases and motivation
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing functionality
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
